name: Eight Under by Mike Bury Golf
address: 4030 N MacArthur Blvd Suite 222, Irving, TX 75038
about: Eight Under by Mike Bury Golf is an indoor golf simulator and training facility in Irving, TX, equipped with TrackMan technology. It operates on a 24/7 access model, requiring a membership for entry. Memberships start at $97 per year and include 2 hours of TrackMan time with discounted rates for additional usage. The facility offers a clean, modern environment focused on game improvement through technology, with options for lessons, club fitting, and private events. It is designed for serious golfers seeking practice and analysis without the constraints of tee times or weather.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with smart door unlocking via booking
Top-tier TrackMan technology for accurate swing and ball data
Clean, modern facility with no tee sheets or restrictions
On-site coaching and club fitting available

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of on-site food service; BYOB policy not specified
No mention of alcohol service available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: TrackMan technology is highlighted as the primary simulator system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs. Clubs must be thoroughly cleaned before entering the facility to avoid damaging the simulator screens and affecting the experience.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No mention of food or drink service is provided. It is recommended to contact the venue directly for BYOB policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify an exact time for playing 18 holes. Simulators typically allow for faster play than traditional courses, but timing may vary based on booking length and simulator usage.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While families are mentioned as a target audience, there is no specific mention of kid-friendly amenities or junior programs. Contact the venue for details on family accommodations.
